# G0LiteLLaMa Release Artifacts

Generated release builds are written here by `G0LiteLLaMa/scripts/build-release.*`.
The generated platform folders are ignored by Git.

Expected artifact names:

```text
g0litellama-darwin-arm64/g0litellama
g0litellama-darwin-amd64/g0litellama
g0litellama-windows-amd64/g0litellama.exe
g0litellama-windows-arm64/g0litellama.exe
```
